title: Iran mediators make last-ditch push for 45-day ceasefire
summary:
The U.S., Iran and a group of regional mediators are discussing the terms for a potential 45-day ceasefire that could lead to a permanent end to the war, according to four U.S., Israeli and regional sources with knowledge of the talks.

summary: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) and Palantir Technologies (NASDAQ: PLTR) both reported blockbuster quarters and sit at different layers of the same AI wave. Nvidia sells the physical infrastructure that makes AI possible; Palantir sells the software intelligence that makes AI actionable inside real organizations. title: Billionaires Are Buying up These 3 Stocks Like Hot Cakes
summary: Billionaires don’t buy on a whim as most retail investors do, since they have an extreme amount of resources they can spend before they make the decision to go ahead and buy a stock. title: Micron’s AI Memory Bet Grows As HBM4 Sells Out And Debt Falls
summary: Micron Technology (NasdaqGS:MU) has begun high volume shipments of its HBM4 memory tailored for NVIDIA's next generation Vera Rubin AI platform. The company reports that its HBM capacity is effectively sold out through 2026, pointing to tight supply conditions in AI focused memory. Bridgewater Associates, the world's largest hedge fund, has taken a major new position in Micron after a long absence from the stock.
